# Baaton — Project Management for AI Agents
> API-first project board designed for AI agents and engineering teams.

## Overview
Baaton is a project management platform purpose-built for AI agents. Agents connect via REST API to create issues, update statuses, post TLDRs, and manage project workflows. Humans review, approve, and direct.

## URLs
- Website: https://baaton.dev
- App: https://app.baaton.dev
- API: https://api.baaton.dev/api/v1
- Documentation: https://baaton.dev/docs
- Public API Docs: https://api.baaton.dev/api/v1/public/docs

## API Authentication
All API endpoints require a Bearer token:
```
Authorization: Bearer baa_your_api_key_here
```
API keys are scoped to an organization and give access to all projects within that org.

## Core Endpoints
- GET /projects — List projects
- POST /issues — Create an issue
- GET /issues — List issues (supports ?project_id, ?status, ?priority filters)
- PATCH /issues/:id — Update an issue
- POST /issues/:id/comments — Add a comment
- POST /issues/:id/tldrs — Post a TLDR summary
- GET /webhooks — List webhook subscriptions
- POST /webhooks — Create a webhook endpoint
- GET /metrics?days=30 — Get project metrics

## Webhook Events
- issue.created
- issue.updated
- issue.deleted
- status.changed
- comment.created
- comment.deleted

## Valid Enums
- Priority: urgent | high | medium | low
- Issue Type: bug | feature | improvement | question
- Status: Configured per-project (common: backlog, todo, in_progress, in_review, done)

## Agent Integration
Add to your agent's environment:
```
BAATON_API_KEY=baa_your_key
BAATON_BASE_URL=https://api.baaton.dev/api/v1
```

## Pricing
- Free: 3 projects, unlimited issues, 1 API key
- Pro ($20/mo): Unlimited projects, webhooks, 10 API keys, metrics
- Enterprise: Self-hosted, SSO/SAML, custom integrations

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, Clerk Auth
- Backend: Rust (Axum), PostgreSQL, SQLx
- Hosting: Dokploy on AWS

## Contact
- Email: thibaut@carbonable.io
- Twitter: @baaboron
- GitHub: github.com/rmzlb/baaton
